title: ECSC Decisions of the Representatives of the Governments of the Member State of the ECSC meeting in Council (A) prolonging the validity of the Decision of 30 October 1972 in respect of rolling-mill cylinders until 30 June 1973 (B) in respect of exports of ferrous scrap to third countries ( Continued in Provisions )
subject: EUROPEAN COAL AND STEEL COMMUNITY (ECSC)
